tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode features. Identify key functionalities, strengths, and unique features. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/claudecode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze copilot-cli features and capabilities. Identify key functionalities, strengths, and unique features. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/copilot_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../opencode to analyze OpenCode features. Identify key functionalities, strengths, and unique features. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze Roocode Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze roocode features and capabilities. Identify key functionalities, strengths, and unique features. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/roocode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Product Review and Feature Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Review our current product and compare it with competitor analyses from s1-s4. Identify missing features that should be implemented. Create a comprehensive list of suggested feature additions.

tasks.title: Create SWARMOUT2.md Implementation Plan
tasks.description: Using the feature gap analysis from s5, create a document called SWARMOUT2.md in target/temp/swarmout/. Include: 1) Executive summary of recommended features, 2) Detailed milestone plan with phases, 3) Specific tasks for each milestone, 4) Prioritization of features. Structure the document clearly with headers and bullet points.
